details: The agent successfully navigated to the correct Wikipedia URL and used JavaScript DOM queries to extract actual table data. The agent reported all laureates for the 3 most recent years (2025, 2024, 2023) with correct names and rationales that match known Nobel Prize records (2024: Hopfield/Hinton for ML; 2023: Agostini/Krausz/L'Huillier for attosecond physics). The data was clearly extracted from the live page rather than hallucinated.
